response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided lyrics references for both 'Deep Fake' and 'Umi Unya Happy Life'. The MC segment was manually transcribed and translated. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the song lyrics references for composition and spelling. Discarded the typos in 'Umi Unya Happy Life' (e.g., 'お水とろの字が' corrected to 'お水とのどが'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all segments precisely, keeping transitions clean and ensuring no cascading delays. Panting and MC talking transitions are fully synced.

subtitles.original: 皆でさぁ ずっと取り繕っている

subtitles.original: それまでただ よせのから
subtitles.english: ...until then, just drafting the sky

subtitles.original: はあ…はあ…はあ…みんな、どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: *pant* *pant* *pant* Everyone, how was it?

subtitles.original: いや、今回はですね、あのハウスダンスに初めて挑戦したんですけれども
subtitles.english: So, this time, I challenged myself with house dancing for the first time.

subtitles.original: あの、2ヶ月で、あの、詰め込んで踊れてましたか？
subtitles.english: I crammed it all in just two months. Did it look like I was dancing?

subtitles.original: いや、「めっちゃ頑張った」ってコメントが書いてくれてるんだろうなぁ、いやはや
subtitles.english: I'm sure everyone is writing comments like "you worked really hard!" Oh my.

subtitles.original: でね、あの「波に名前をつけること、僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること」って曲では
subtitles.english: And in the song "Naming the Waves, Knowing Our Breath Will End"...

subtitles.original: リフトをしたり、あのクルクル回って、あれも初めてやりました。踊れてたら嬉しいね！
subtitles.english: ...we did lifts, and spun around, which was also a first for me. I'd be happy if I danced it well!

subtitles.original: いや、ゲストのね、ハコ太郎先輩とも、いけいけに踊って
subtitles.english: I danced energetically with our guest, Hako-taro senpai...

subtitles.original: スバル先輩、憧れのスバル先輩と2人きりでドキドキタイムしちゃったり
subtitles.english: ...and had a heart-fluttering moment alone with my admired Subaru-senpai...

subtitles.original: ロボ子先輩と、いろは先輩と、らでんちゃんとはもう対決して
subtitles.english: I also battled Roboco-senpai, Iroha-senpai, and Raden-chan...

subtitles.original: ロボ子さんとマリンちゃんはカップルで
subtitles.english: ...Roboco-san and Marine-chan acted as a couple...

subtitles.original: AZKiちゃんとはかっこよく、いや〜
subtitles.english: ...and had a cool duet with AZKi-chan. Oh my...

subtitles.original: ゲストパートもたくさんね、素晴らしいのがあったんじゃないでしょうか？
subtitles.english: ...there were so many amazing things in the guest parts, wasn't there?

subtitles.original: ということで、皆さん、何か忘れてませんか？
subtitles.english: And with that, everyone, aren't you forgetting something?

subtitles.original: ね、皆さん、ちょっと水宮の休憩タイムもね、もうそろそろ終わらないといけない
subtitles.english: You know, Umi's break time also has to end pretty soon.

subtitles.original: よし、立つか！よいしょ！
subtitles.english: Alright, time to stand up! Up we go!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、なんとですね、こんな感じで言うのもなんなんですが
subtitles.english: Yes! And so, believe it or not, I don't know how to say this, but...

subtitles.original: 新曲が出ます！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: ...a new song is coming out! Yay!

subtitles.original: 初のオリジナル楽曲！フフフフフ！
subtitles.english: My very first original song! *giggle*

subtitles.original: やばい、体が疲れた、よっこらしょ、はい
subtitles.english: Oh no, my body is so tired. Up we go. Okay.

subtitles.original: ということで、えっと作詞・作曲・編曲は、サトダユーリさんに作ってもらいました！
subtitles.english: And so, the lyrics, composition, and arrangement were done by Satoda Yuri-san!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ドンドンパフパフ！ドンドンパフパフ！
subtitles.english: Thank you! *trumpet fanfare*!

subtitles.original: はい、このあと、すぐMV公開がね、この配信が終わったあとあるのですが、リダイレクトで飛びます
subtitles.english: Yes, the MV will be released right after this stream ends, and you'll be redirected there.

subtitles.original: そしてデジタルリリースは、今日の0時からなので、たくさん聴いてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: Also, the digital release starts at midnight tonight, so I'd be happy if you listened to it a lot!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ちょっと早速なんですが、その新曲をお披露目しちゃおうかな？
subtitles.english: So, without further ado, shall I perform that new song for you?

subtitles.original: いや、どんな楽曲なんだろう？気になるな！どんな楽曲なんだろう？いきます！
subtitles.english: Wow, what kind of song is it? I'm so curious! What kind of song is it? Here we go!

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃ うみゃうみゃ うみゃうみゃ うみゃうみゃ
subtitles.english: Umi-unya, Umi-unya...

subtitles.original: くるるん くるるん
subtitles.english: Kururun, kururun

subtitles.original: あ〜そろそろご飯の時間かな？
subtitles.english: Ah, is it almost mealtime?

subtitles.original: あ、でもでも やっぱやっぱ 家から一歩も出たくないっ！
subtitles.english: Ah, but but, no no, I don't want to take a single step out of the house!

subtitles.original: こんな時はそうだ！お水とのどが
subtitles.english: In times like this, that's right! Water and throat...

subtitles.original: 説明しよう！極限までお腹を空かし美味しくいただくのだ！
subtitles.english: Let me explain! Starving myself to the limit and eating it deliciously!

subtitles.original: めんどうい めんどうい マジめんどういわ けっきょくぐだぐだ時間とけたわ
subtitles.english: It's a hassle, a hassle, seriously a hassle. In the end, everything is time melting away

subtitles.original: ぴりんぴりん 5回目アラーム コンビニいこー
subtitles.english: Pi-rin pi-rin, the 5th alarm. Let's go to the convenience store

subtitles.original: わちゃわちゃ はちゃめちゃ 奇想天外 ドタバタ てんやわんや見逃せない
subtitles.english: Chaotic, messy, whimsical, bustling, hectic, don't miss it!

subtitles.original: ピンチだって ちょちょいのちょいで てやっ てやっ そりゃ そりゃ 万事解決☆
subtitles.english: Even in a pinch, it's a piece of cake! Te-ya, te-ya, so-ryah, so-ryah, everything is solved☆

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃ うみゃうみゃ 美味しくなぁれ あれもこれも全部食べたいな
subtitles.english: Umi-unya, Umi-unya, be delicious! I want to eat everything

subtitles.original: ぱくぱく うみゃうみゃ ハピネスライフ 食べて寝て遊んで また食べる
subtitles.english: Pak-pak, Umi-unya, Happiness Life! Eat, sleep, play, and eat again

subtitles.original: ぺこぺこ ぺこぺこ はらぺこちゃん うみゃうみゃ うまくいきません
subtitles.english: Hungry, hungry, hungry girl! Umi-unya, it's not going well

subtitles.original: ひとまずご飯をお腹いっぱい 食べさせてよ
subtitles.english: For now, let me eat my fill of food

subtitles.original: うみゃうみゃ うみゃうみゃ うにゃうにゃ うみゃうみゃ
subtitles.english: Umi-unya, Umi-unya...
